title: arctotis campanulata
intro: Arctotis campanulata, also known as the African daisy or Cape marigold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Arctotis campanulata include its ability to treat skin conditions, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
